Consolidation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne's background process that optimizes memory organization, inspired by human sleep's role in memory consolidation."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"What Sleep Does"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"During each sleep cycle, Mnemosyne:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Scans"}]," Working Memory for consolidation candidates"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Ranks"}]," entries by importance, recency, and access patterns"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promotes"}]," high-value entries to Episodic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Extracts"}]," structured facts for Semantic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Compresses"}]," related entries using AAAK"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Evicts"}]," entries that exceed retention limits"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Trigger Conditions"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Sleep cycles trigger on:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Time interval"}],": Every ",["$","code",null,{"children":"consolidation_interval"}]," seconds (default: 3600)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Capacity pressure"}],": When Working Memory reaches 80% of max"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Explicit call"}],": ","$L7"," for manual consolidation"]}],"\n","$L8","\n"]}],"\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11"],["$L12"],"$L13"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@14"]},null,false,"$@14"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L15",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$16",["$L17"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"C6LhGepHYve25SSxApNI_"}
